title: Remote support instant clicks + context menu fix
description:
Remote assistance clicks were routed only through HTTP polling (~2 second delay). Control input now uses the WebRTC data channel when open, with HTTP as fallback when the channel is down. Context menu items (e.g. Adjust workspace layout) were missed because menus live outside the portal root — targeting and pointer events are fixed.

Who is affected: remote help on pipeshare.live.
changeLog: Admin clicks sent over WebRTC data channel when connected (HTTP fallback only when DC closed).
Customer applies control events immediately from data channel instead of waiting on poll.
Context menu items (.cp-ctx-menu__item) included in remote hit-testing.
Synthetic pointerdown + click sequence matches context menu handlers.
